description: Test cases for ArkUI API Design Skill evaluation

jsdoc_terminology.name: JSDOC Terminology
jsdoc_terminology.description: Tests for correct use of 'Called when' and other JSDOC terminology

test_cases.name: Event Callback Correct Wording
test_cases.description: Event callback should use 'Called when' phrasing

input.code:
/**
 * Callback invoked when the paste button is clicked.
 *
 * @param callback - Callback function for the click event.
 * @syscap SystemCapability.ArkUI.ArkUI.Full
 * @since 10 dynamic
 */
onClick(callback: Callback<ClickEvent>): PasteButtonAttribute;

test_cases.name: Property Setter Incorrect Wording
test_cases.description: Property setter should NOT use 'Called when' phrasing

test_cases.name: Property Setter Correct Wording
test_cases.description: Property setter should use action verbs

input.code:
/**
 * Sets the font size for the text component.
 *
 * @param value - Font size in fp. Valid range: 0-1000fp.
 * @unit fp
 * @syscap SystemCapability.ArkUI.ArkUI.Full
 * @since 7 dynamic
 */
fontSize(value: number | string | Length | Resource): TextAttribute;

test_cases.name: Layout Property Correct Wording
test_cases.description: Layout property should use 'Sets the' phrasing

input.code:
/**
 * Sets the vertical alignment of child components.
 *
 * @param value - Alignment mode for child components.
 * @syscap SystemCapability.ArkUI.ArkUI.Full
 * @since 7 dynamic
 */
alignItems(value: AlignItems): RowAttribute;

test_cases.name: Lifecycle Method Correct Wording
test_cases.description: Lifecycle method should use 'Called when' phrasing

input.code:
/**
 * Callback invoked when the component appears.
 *
 * @param callback - Callback function.
 * @syscap SystemCapability.ArkUI.ArkUI.Full
 * @since 7 dynamic
 */
onAppear(callback: () => void): CommonMethod;

static_dynamic_sync.name: Static/Dynamic API Synchronization
static_dynamic_sync.description: Tests for static and dynamic API consistency

test_cases.name: Matching Property Types
test_cases.description: Static and dynamic APIs should have matching parameter types

test_cases.name: Mismatched Property Types
test_cases.description: Static and dynamic APIs should not have different parameter types

test_cases.name: Correct Version Tags
test_cases.description: Static API should use @since X static, dynamic should use @since X dynamic

resource_type_support.name: Resource Type Support
resource_type_support.description: Tests for correct Resource/ResourceStr type usage

test_cases.name: API 12 Should Use Resource
test_cases.description: API 12 and earlier should use string | Resource for compatibility

input.code: fontSize(value: number | string | Length | Resource): TextAttribute;

test_cases.name: API 13 Should Use ResourceStr
test_cases.description: New APIs (API 13+) should use ResourceStr for simplified type

input.code: fontSize(value: number | string | Length | ResourceStr): TextAttribute;

test_cases.name: API 12 Should Not Use ResourceStr
test_cases.description: API 12 should not be modified to use ResourceStr

input.code: fontSize(value: number | string | Length | ResourceStr): TextAttribute;

expected.issue: Should maintain backward compatibility with string | Resource

test_cases.name: State Flags Should Not Support Resource
test_cases.description: State flags and booleans should not support Resource type

complete_jsdoc.name: Complete JSDOC Documentation
complete_jsdoc.description: Tests for complete and accurate JSDOC comments

input.code:
/**
 * Sets the font size.
 *
 * @param value - Font size in fp. Valid range: 0-1000fp.
 * @unit fp
 * @since 7 dynamic
 * @syscap SystemCapability.ArkUI.ArkUI.Full
 */

/**
 * Sets the font size.
 *
 * @param value - Font size in fp.
 * @since 7 dynamic
 * @syscap SystemCapability.ArkUI.ArkUI.Full
 */

/**
 * Sets the component width.
 * @param value Width value in vp. If undefined, restores default width.
 * @unit vp
 * @since 8 dynamic
 */
